About Me

Turning Vision Into Reality

I am a Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in designing and developing scalable web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. I have a strong understanding of REST API architecture, real-time systems, and database management.

Experienced in building end-to-end applications including dashboards, automation tools, and AI-based systems. I've developed projects involving chat systems, social media automation, and machine learning models with a focus on performance, usability, and scalability.

My journey in tech is driven by a passion for solving complex problems — whether it's optimizing backend performance, implementing real-time features with Socket.io, or crafting pixel-perfect, responsive user interfaces.

Location Pilani, Rajasthan
Current Role Software Developer @ OnePixel Soft
Education B.Tech CSE — BKBIET (7.5 CGPA)
Languages C++, Python, JavaScript, Java
5+ Production Projects
200+ LeetCode Problems
3+ Industry Experiences
SIH'23 Hackathon Finalist
Services

What I Do

Frontend Development

Building responsive, interactive user interfaces with React.js, modern CSS, and smooth animations that delight users.

Backend Development

Designing scalable REST APIs and server architectures with Node.js. Implementing real-time features using Socket.io.

Database Design

Structuring efficient database schemas with MongoDB and MySQL. Optimizing queries for high-performance applications.

AI & Automation

Building intelligent chatbots with NLP, automating workflows, and integrating machine learning models into web applications.

Portfolio

Selected Projects

Social Media Manager

Full Stack

A comprehensive social media management platform built for agencies and businesses. Features include automated post scheduling with a visual content calendar, client approval workflows via WhatsApp integration, real-time analytics dashboard tracking engagement and reach, and multi-client account management with role-based access control. The system automates the entire content lifecycle from creation to publishing across multiple platforms.

React.js Node.js MongoDB Express.js WhatsApp API Socket.io

Task Chat Application

Real-Time

A real-time collaborative workspace combining instant messaging with project task management. Users can create team channels, send messages with real-time delivery powered by Socket.io, assign and track tasks with priority levels and due dates, and receive push notifications for mentions and updates. Built with a responsive design that works seamlessly across desktop and mobile devices.

Socket.io React.js Node.js MongoDB WebSockets

AI-Powered Support Agent

AI / NLP

An intelligent customer support chatbot leveraging Natural Language Processing for automated query resolution. The system uses spaCy for entity extraction and scikit-learn for intent classification, achieving high accuracy in understanding user queries. Features include context-aware responses, conversation history tracking, and seamless escalation to human agents. Reduced average response time by ~40% compared to traditional support workflows.

Python spaCy scikit-learn NLP Flask

Web Scraper

Automation

An automated data extraction tool designed for collecting structured data from websites at scale. Built using Selenium for dynamic page rendering and BeautifulSoup for HTML parsing. Features include headless browser mode for server deployment, configurable extraction rules, data export to CSV/JSON formats, proxy rotation, and request throttling to avoid rate limiting. Handles pagination and JavaScript-rendered content automatically.

Python Selenium BeautifulSoup Pandas

Diabetes Prediction System

Machine Learning

A machine learning-based health prediction system that analyzes patient data to assess diabetes risk with ~85% accuracy. The model was trained on clinical datasets using supervised learning techniques including Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and SVM. Implemented comprehensive data preprocessing with feature scaling, handling of missing values, and exploratory data analysis. Includes a confusion matrix visualization and feature importance analysis.

Python scikit-learn Pandas NumPy Matplotlib
